FEATURE: Private leaderboard with anonymous player identity, personal bests, shared score validation, and game-over UI integration.
REQUIREMENTS: Submit playerId and score on game over.
Persist each player's top 100 runs and personal best.
Generate anonymous UUID identity once and store it in localStorage.
Accept only non-negative integer scores up to Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER.
Keep score submission non-blocking and show graceful fallback text for fetch failures.
Use existing game menu CSS variables and patterns.

ARCHITECTURE.networkIo: React GameCanvas effects only; Game.ts and systems remain synchronous.
ARCHITECTURE.validation: shared/leaderboard/zodSchemas.ts for server routes; shared/leaderboard/validation.ts for client UX helpers.
ARCHITECTURE.server: Node http server with better-sqlite3 for the leaderboard database.
ARCHITECTURE.database: players table stores personal bests; score_runs table stores private individual runs ranked by score desc and created_at asc.
ARCHITECTURE.frontend: GameCanvas orchestrates submit/fetch; GameMenu remains presentational.
